CREATE TABLE [Reclamos] (
    [Id] int NOT NULL IDENTITY,
    [NumeroReclamo] nvarchar(max) NOT NULL,
    [PolizaId] int NOT NULL,
    [NumeroPoliza] nvarchar(max) NOT NULL,
    [ClienteNombre] nvarchar(max) NOT NULL,
    [ClienteApellido] nvarchar(max) NOT NULL,
    [FechaReclamo] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    [FechaResolucion] datetime2 NULL,
    [TipoReclamo] int NOT NULL,
    [Estado] int NOT NULL,
    [Descripcion] nvarchar(max) NOT NULL,
    [MontoReclamado] decimal(18,2) NULL,
    [MontoAprobado] decimal(18,2) NULL,
    [Moneda] nvarchar(max) NOT NULL,
    [Prioridad] int NOT NULL,
    [Observaciones] nvarchar(max) NULL,
    [DocumentosAdjuntos] nvarchar(max) NULL,
    [UsuarioAsignadoId] int NULL,
    [UsuarioAsignadoNombre] nvarchar(max) NULL,
    [FechaLimiteRespuesta] datetime2 NULL,
    [CreatedAt] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    [UpdatedAt] datetime2 NULL,
    [CreatedBy] nvarchar(max) NOT NULL,
    [UpdatedBy] nvarchar(max) NULL,
    [IsDeleted] bit NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_Reclamos] PRIMARY KEY ([Id]),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Reclamos_Polizas_PolizaId] FOREIGN KEY ([PolizaId]) REFERENCES [Polizas] ([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Reclamos_Users_UsuarioAsignadoId] FOREIGN KEY ([UsuarioAsignadoId]) REFERENCES [Users] ([Id])
);

SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[CreatedAt], [t].[CreatedBy], [t].[Email], [t].[FirstName], [t].[IsActive], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[LastLoginAt], [t].[LastName], [t].[LastPasswordChangeAt], [t].[PasswordHash], [t].[RequiresPasswordChange], [t].[UpdatedAt], [t].[UpdatedBy], [t].[UserName], [t0].[Id], [t0].[CreatedAt], [t0].[CreatedBy], [t0].[IsDeleted], [t0].[RoleId], [t0].[UpdatedAt], [t0].[UpdatedBy], [t0].[UserId], [t0].[Id0], [t0].[CreatedAt0], [t0].[CreatedBy0], [t0].[Description], [t0].[IsActive], [t0].[IsDeleted0], [t0].[Name], [t0].[UpdatedAt0], [t0].[UpdatedBy0]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[CreatedBy], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[LastLoginAt], [u].[LastName], [u].[LastPasswordChangeAt], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RequiresPasswordChange], [u].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UpdatedBy], [u].[UserName]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [u].[Id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[CreatedBy], [u0].[IsDeleted], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[UpdatedAt], [u0].[UpdatedBy], [u0].[UserId], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t1].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t1].[Description], [t1].[IsActive], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Name], [t1].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [t1].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [r].[Id], [r].[CreatedAt], [r].[CreatedBy], [r].[Description], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[Name], [r].[UpdatedAt], [r].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Roles] AS [r]
        WHERE [r].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [t1].[Id]
    WHERE [u0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id], [t0].[Id]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[CreatedBy], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[LastLoginAt], [u].[LastName], [u].[LastPasswordChangeAt], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RequiresPasswordChange], [u].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UpdatedBy], [u].[UserName]

) AS [t]

    WHERE [u0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id], [t0].[Id]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[CreatedBy], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[LastLoginAt], [u].[LastName], [u].[LastPasswordChangeAt], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RequiresPasswordChange], [u].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UpdatedBy], [u].[UserName]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [u].[Id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[CreatedBy], [u0].[IsDeleted], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[UpdatedAt], [u0].[UpdatedBy], [u0].[UserId], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t1].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t1].[Description], [t1].[IsActive], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Name], [t1].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [t1].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [r].[Id], [r].[CreatedAt], [r].[CreatedBy], [r].[Description], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[Name], [r].[UpdatedAt], [r].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Roles] AS [r]
        WHERE [r].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [t1].[Id]
    WHERE [u0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id], [t0].[Id]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[CreatedBy], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[LastLoginAt], [u].[LastName], [u].[LastPasswordChangeAt], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RequiresPasswordChange], [u].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UpdatedBy], [u].[UserName]

) AS [t]

    SELECT [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[CreatedBy], [u0].[IsDeleted], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[UpdatedAt], [u0].[UpdatedBy], [u0].[UserId], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t1].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t1].[Description], [t1].[IsActive], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Name], [t1].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [t1].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [r].[Id], [r].[CreatedAt], [r].[CreatedBy], [r].[Description], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[Name], [r].[UpdatedAt], [r].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Roles] AS [r]
        WHERE [r].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [t1].[Id]
    WHERE [u0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id], [t0].[Id]

    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
        WHERE [u0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [u].[Id] = [u0].[UserId]) THEN (
        SELECT TOP(1) [t].[Name]
        FROM [UserRoles] AS [u1]
        INNER JOIN (
            SELECT [r].[Id], [r].[CreatedAt], [r].[CreatedBy], [r].[Description], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[Name], [r].[UpdatedAt], [r].[UpdatedBy]
            FROM [Roles] AS [r]
            WHERE [r].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
        ) AS [t] ON [u1].[RoleId] = [t].[Id]
        WHERE [u1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [u].[Id] = [u1].[UserId])
    ELSE N'Sin Rol'
END AS [Rol]
FROM [Users] AS [u]

SELECT [u].[Id], LTRIM(RTRIM([u].[FirstName] + N' ' + [u].[LastName])) AS [Nombre], [u].[Email], [u].[LastLoginAt], [u].[IsActive], CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
        WHERE [u0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [u].[Id] = [u0].[UserId]) THEN (
        SELECT TOP(1) [t].[Name]
        FROM [UserRoles] AS [u1]
        INNER JOIN (
            SELECT [r].[Id], [r].[CreatedAt], [r].[CreatedBy], [r].[Description], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[Name], [r].[UpdatedAt], [r].[UpdatedBy]
            FROM [Roles] AS [r]
            WHERE [r].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
        ) AS [t] ON [u1].[RoleId] = [t].[Id]
        WHERE [u1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [u].[Id] = [u1].[UserId])
    ELSE N'Sin Rol'
END AS [Rol]
FROM [Users] AS [u]
WHERE [u].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [u].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
